[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Chapter 4.5 Binomial theorem]]The binomial theorem is linked to pascal's triangle

== Pascal's triangle ==

[[File:PascalTriangleAnimated2.gif|thumb|In Pascal's triangle, each number is the sum of the two numbers directly above it.]]kkk

== Birthday probability ==
it is used in birthday probability
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Chapter 4.5 Binomial theorem]][[sn:Chapter 4.5 Binomial theorem]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
